# Fillit/Tetromino Solver Roadmap

## Goal

Read tetrominoes from a file and arrange them into the smallest square possible.

---

## Skills Learned

### Go Fundamentals
- Packages
- Structs
- Methods
- Slices
- Error handling
- File I/O

### Data Structures
- 2D grids
- Coordinate systems

### Algorithms
- DFS/BFS validation
- Backtracking
- Constraint solving

### Software Engineering
- Project structure
- Unit testing
- Separation of concerns

---

## Project Phases

### Phase 0
Environment Setup

Learn:
- go mod init
- package structure
- running tests

Deliverable:
- Project compiles

---

### Phase 1
File Reading

Learn:
- os.ReadFile
- command line arguments

Deliverable:
- Print file contents

---

### Phase 2
Parser

Learn:
- strings.Split
- validation basics

Deliverable:
- Parse tetromino blocks

---

### Phase 3
Tetromino Validation

Learn:
- coordinate extraction
- graph connectivity

Deliverable:
- Reject invalid pieces

---

### Phase 4
Normalization

Learn:
- coordinate transformations

Deliverable:
- Convert tetrominoes to normalized coordinates

---

### Phase 5
Board

Learn:
- 2D slices
- helper methods

Deliverable:
- Create and print boards

---

### Phase 6
Placement

Learn:
- collision detection

Deliverable:
- Place and remove tetrominoes

---

### Phase 7
Backtracking Solver

Learn:
- recursion
- search trees

Deliverable:
- Solve simple cases

---

### Phase 8
Smallest Square Search

Learn:
- optimization

Deliverable:
- Full project works

---

### Phase 9
Testing

Learn:
- table driven tests

Deliverable:
- Reliable solution
tetromino-solver/
│
├── cmd/
│   └── main.go
│
├── internal/
│   ├── parser/
│   │   └── parser.go
│   │
│   ├── board/
│   │   └── board.go
│   │
│   └── solver/
│       └── solver.go
│
├── tests/
│
├── sample.txt
│
├── go.mod
│
└── ROADMAP.md
